message:
refactor(freeze): use arena + wyhash hashmap for dispatch registry

Replace fixed 16K array with dynamic arena-backed hashmaps:
- No arbitrary MAX_FROZEN_FUNCTIONS limit (was 16384)
- Uses hashmap_helper with wyhash (same as Bun) for fast lookups
- Arena allocator for efficient memory - only allocates what's needed
- Memory freed all at once on clear()

Benefits:
- Small programs use less memory (no 400KB fixed array)
- Large programs (TypeScript 8K+ functions) have no limit
- Faster lookups with wyhash vs FNV-1a
